rows.title: External temp-data backup pipeline (outside git)
rows.problem: Preserve high-churn runtime/state data without repo noise
rows.acceptance: `systems/ops/state_backup.js` + `config/state_backup_policy.json`, optional daily spine hook (`STATE_BACKUP_ENABLED=1`), retention policy encoded

rows.title: Skill quarantine enforcement in all install paths
rows.problem: Prevent unreviewed skill install bypasses
rows.acceptance: Strict enforcer scans `systems/`, `habits/`, `skills/`, and `memory/tools/` (tests excluded), blocks direct installer patterns (shell + spawn/exec forms), and requires wrapper + quarantine structure to pass

rows.title: Autonomy receipt dashboard/summary
rows.problem: Make pass/fail verification visible without raw log digging
rows.acceptance: Daily summary command/report shows receipt pass rate + top failure reasons

rows.title: AGI security/governance hardening pack
rows.problem: Prevent capability-overhang failures as model capability increases
rows.acceptance: Dual-control approval for strategy mode escalation + non-bypass budget/risk caps + immutable policy/kernel verification + one-command emergency stop path tested

rows.title: Autonomous skill-add with necessity justification gate
rows.problem: Allow Protheus to add skills safely only when operationally justified
rows.acceptance: `install_skill_safe.js` enforces necessity scoring for `--autonomous=1` installs using policy-defined structured justification (`problem`, `repeat_frequency`, `expected_time_or_token_savings`, `risk_class`, `why_existing_habits_or_skills_insufficient`); novelty-only reasons are blocked with receipts

rows.title: Strategic alignment oracle (weekly)
rows.problem: Keep unattended autonomy optimizing for T1 outcomes instead of infrastructure churn
rows.acceptance: `systems/autonomy/alignment_oracle.js` writes weekly `alignment_score` artifacts (`state/autonomy/alignment_oracle/`), links to proposal/receipt evidence, emits deduped `autonomy_human_escalation` rows on low-streak escalation, and is executed by spine via `SPINE_ALIGNMENT_ORACLE_ENABLED`

rows.title: Exception novelty classifier + recovery policy
rows.problem: Prevent retry spirals and route genuinely new failures to human review quickly
rows.acceptance: Classifier stores signature memory and now applies deterministic recovery decisions from `config/autonomy_exception_recovery_policy.json`; autonomy exception telemetry includes action/cooldown/playbook fields, and novel signatures route to escalation policy

rows.title: Global cost governor + autopause guardrails
rows.problem: Enforce hard resource boundaries across autonomy/reflex/focus/dream paths
rows.acceptance: Unified daily/monthly budget policies apply to all adaptive executors, burn-rate spike and low-credit thresholds trigger automatic pause/degrade actions, and every block/allow decision is audit-logged with reason

rows.title: Dream-to-upstream signal bridge
rows.problem: Ensure dream outputs influence proposal/admission/ranking instead of remaining passive artifacts
rows.acceptance: Proposal enrichment/autonomy ranking ingest dream tokens/themes (bounded influence + audit fields), and runs emit measurable dream-hit attribution in proposal metadata

rows.title: Adaptive dream-model failover + cooldown memory
rows.problem: Prevent repeated `smallthinker` timeout loops and keep dream cycle resilient
rows.acceptance: Idle/REM model selection records per-model timeout/error history, applies cooldown/backoff, auto-fails over to alternate local models, and logs fallback reasons deterministically

rows.title: Policy for tracked vs ignored state streams
rows.problem: Keep audit logs intentional and reduce accidental tracking drift
rows.acceptance: One doc defines tracked state classes and `.gitignore` alignment

rows.title: Habit promotion quality hardening
rows.problem: Prevent no-op scaffolds from promoting without real value
rows.acceptance: Promotion checks include measured savings/effect threshold

rows.title: Automated stale-state cleanup helper
rows.problem: Reduce local churn from old generated artifacts
rows.acceptance: Non-destructive cleanup command with dry-run and allowlist

rows.title: Hardware-aware local model planner
rows.problem: Keep local routing aligned with actual machine capacity
rows.acceptance: Router can detect CPU/RAM/VRAM class, recommend/update eligible local models, and log changes before activation

rows.title: Model variant profiles (`:thinking` and base)
rows.problem: Use reasoning variants only when justified to control cost/latency
rows.acceptance: Routing policy defines when to use thinking variants, with auto-return to anchor model and measurable quality gain

rows.title: Swarm verification mode for deep-thinker
rows.problem: Multi-agent cross-check for high-stakes reasoning once swarm capability exists
rows.acceptance: Deep-thinker can run parallel model checks with quorum/consensus policy and bounded token budget

rows.title: Strategy profile layer + architecture genericity guard
rows.problem: Keep specialization out of `systems/` while enabling adaptive policy
rows.acceptance: `config/strategies/` active profile loaded by autonomy gates; architecture guard available in audit/strict modes; initial rollout uses `execution_policy.mode=score_only`

rows.title: Phased TypeScript migration for `systems/` + `lib/`
rows.problem: Reduce contract drift and runtime breakage in high-permanence layers without rewriting architecture
rows.acceptance: `systems/` + `lib/` are TS-owned with wrapper-only JS (`lib/ts_bootstrap.js`), `npm run typecheck:systems` is green, and `node systems/ops/dist_runtime_cutover.js legacy-pairs --strict=1` reports zero legacy pairs

rows.title: Optional reflex sub-layer under habits (fast micro-routines)
rows.problem: Improve adaptation latency for frequent tiny tasks without promoting permanent system changes
rows.acceptance: Add `habits/reflexes/` runtime path and tiny-model executor; reflex generation/degradation mirrors habit promotion/decay rules; router can prefer reflex before habit when confidence and latency budget are met

rows.title: Cross-device active-state continuity layer
rows.problem: Preserve in-flight autonomy/routing context when switching active shell/device without split-brain
rows.acceptance: Add `systems/continuity/` with lease-based active writer election, checkpoint + delta replay state transfer, takeover on lease expiry, and secret-safe payload policy (no raw creds in continuity artifacts)

rows.title: Proposal admission + queue hygiene hardening
rows.problem: Reduce duplicate/stub/unknown-eye noise before autonomy selection
rows.acceptance: `sensory_queue` dedupes by `proposal_id`, static gate filters stub/unknown-eye eye-attributed proposals, lifecycle status normalized (`filtered` instead of `unknown`), and tests cover quality + dedupe behavior

rows.title: Optional habit cell-pool executor (parallelized by demand + hardware caps)
rows.problem: Extend reflex-style dynamic concurrency to habit execution only if measured ROI justifies complexity
rows.acceptance: Add bounded habit worker pool with hysteresis/cooldowns, per-habit safety gates, and rollback-safe default-off rollout

rows.title: Ignore memory snapshots after backup channels are verified
rows.problem: Keep repo clean once adaptive/normal memory have reliable off-repo backup/restore
rows.acceptance: Define backup integrity checks for memory snapshots, then add scoped `.gitignore` rules for backup-only memory artifacts without ignoring source/config/governance files

rows.title: End-to-end pipeline integration tests (`eyes -> insight -> queue -> execute -> receipt -> score`)
rows.problem: Catch regressions that unit tests miss in autonomous flow handoffs
rows.acceptance: Added deterministic E2E handoff test covering generated + filtered proposals, actuation bridge wiring, dry-run execution, and contract receipt assertions (`memory/tools/tests/pipeline_handoffs.integration.test.js`)

rows.title: Two-phase autonomous change execution with automatic rollback
rows.problem: Prevent partial/bad self-changes from persisting
rows.acceptance: Added `improvement_controller.js start-validated` implementing deterministic `plan -> apply(commit-on-head) -> verify(core checks) -> commit(trial start)` flow; failed verify triggers optional auto-revert and writes contract receipts with root cause (`state/autonomy/improvements/phase_receipts/`)

rows.title: Unified global budget governor across reflex/autonomy/focus/dream/spawn
rows.problem: Prevent resource contention and runaway loops under concurrent adaptive workloads
rows.acceptance: Spawn token budgeting now shares global `system_budget` state/events path by default, autonomy reads same global state dir, focus controller enforces per-run budget gating + writes allow/degrade/deny decisions, and all contention decisions are auditable in centralized budget events

rows.title: Event/state schema versioning + validators + migrations
rows.problem: Eliminate silent JSON/JSONL contract drift over time
rows.acceptance: All persisted contracts carry `schema_version`; reads validate; controlled migrations exist for version bumps

rows.title: Outcome-linked routing learning by task type
rows.problem: Improve model selection quality beyond availability/latency signals
rows.acceptance: Router maintains `task_type x model` success matrix and uses it in ranking/escalation decisions with measurable uplift

rows.title: Ops visibility dashboard + SLO alerts for autonomy health
rows.problem: Make drift/stalls visible before they degrade autonomy quality
rows.acceptance: Daily/weekly report includes dark-eye, proposal starvation, loop stall, and drift SLOs with thresholded alerts

rows.title: Execution-worthiness scoring at queue admission
rows.problem: Prioritize proposals that are concrete and executable, not meta-coordination noise
rows.acceptance: Queue admission computes deterministic execution-worthiness score (objective clarity, command concreteness, verification strength, rollback quality) and blocks low-scoring proposals with explicit reasons

rows.title: Outcome calibration by proposal type (post BL-027 companion)
rows.problem: Track pass-rate by proposal type and tune admission thresholds using per-type shipped/no-change outcomes
rows.acceptance: `outcome_fitness_loop` now emits bounded per-type threshold offsets (`strategy_policy.proposal_type_threshold_offsets`) plus per-type audit reasoning, writes calibration receipts on offset changes (`state/adaptive/strategy/receipts.jsonl`), and proposal admission/gating consume offsets via shared outcome-fitness policy helpers

rows.title: Weekly strategy synthesis from executed outcomes
rows.problem: Ensure strategy layer learns from realized outcomes instead of raw proposal volume
rows.acceptance: Scheduled synthesis summarizes executed proposals, winners/losers, and recommended strategy weight updates with deterministic trace to receipts

rows.title: Secret broker isolation + scoped credential handles
rows.problem: Prevent high-capability models from directly reading raw secrets from disk during autonomous changes
rows.acceptance: Added `lib/secret_broker.js` + `systems/security/secret_broker.js`; autonomous Moltbook flows issue/resolve time-scoped handles; credential reads centralized in broker and audited to `state/security/secret_broker_audit.jsonl`

rows.title: Network egress choke point for autonomous actions
rows.problem: Reduce exfiltration/abuse blast radius by forcing all outbound actions through a policy gate
rows.acceptance: Added `lib/egress_gateway.js` + `systems/security/egress_gateway.js` with `config/egress_gateway_policy.json`; sensory collectors/focus and Moltbook API/guard route outbound HTTP through gateway with allowlists, rate caps, and decision audits in `state/security/egress_audit.jsonl`

rows.title: Signed startup attestation + integrity check at run boot
rows.problem: Detect tampering before autonomy loops execute
rows.acceptance: Boot path emits signed attestation over critical policy/config hashes; autonomy refuses execute/canary when attestation fails or is stale

rows.title: Quorum validator for high-tier self-modification proposals
rows.problem: Add independent cross-check before risky self-edits are applied
rows.acceptance: High-tier mutation proposals require deterministic second-pass validator agreement before admission; disagreement blocks with explainable receipt

rows.title: Operator runbook for incidents + rollback drills
rows.problem: Reduce time-to-recover and remove tribal-knowledge dependency during failures
rows.acceptance: Implemented in `docs/OPERATOR_RUNBOOK.md` with top incident classes (routing degraded, schema drift, sensory starvation, autonomy stall), deterministic remediation, rollback drill, and verification artifacts

rows.title: Required-Checks branch protection policy
rows.problem: Prevent contract/security regressions from merging without gates
rows.acceptance: Implemented `.github/CODEOWNERS`, `.github/workflows/required-checks.yml`, `docs/BRANCH_PROTECTION_POLICY.md`, and local `npm run guard:merge` gates requiring `test:ci`, `contract_check`, `schema_contract_check`, and adaptive guard strict checks

rows.title: Batch execution lane for low-urgency LLM work
rows.problem: Capture major token-cost reductions on deferable workloads without hurting latency-critical tasks
rows.acceptance: Add queueable batch adapter path for low-urgency tasks with deterministic SLA/expiry rules, per-task receipts, and measured token-cost delta vs non-batch baseline

rows.title: Prompt/result cache with TTL + invalidation policy
rows.problem: Reduce repeated LLM spend on near-identical requests while preserving correctness
rows.acceptance: `systems/routing/llm_gateway.js` now stores prompt/result cache entries with TTL + LRU pruning in `state/routing/prompt_result_cache`, supports source fingerprint + bust key invalidation hooks, and emits cache-hit/miss telemetry in gateway audit logs

rows.title: Parallel eyes execution with budget-aware concurrency
rows.problem: Improve sensory throughput without budget/network spikes
rows.acceptance: `habits/scripts/external_eyes.js` now supports bounded parallel eye runs (`EYES_PARALLEL_ENABLED`, `EYES_MAX_PARALLEL`), automatically contracts concurrency under budget pressure from system budget state, and logs active parallel mode/caps during run cycles

rows.title: Backup integrity checks
rows.problem: Catch silent backup corruption
rows.acceptance: Scheduled hash verification and alert on mismatch

rows.title: Repo hygiene CI check for generated artifacts
rows.problem: Prevent noisy files slipping into PRs
rows.acceptance: CI fails if generated paths are staged unexpectedly

rows.title: Full-pipeline integration/e2e hardening
rows.problem: Current tests cover slices; unattended autonomy needs deterministic coverage across all major handoffs
rows.acceptance: Added deterministic full handoff integration with explicit failure-path coverage (`memory/tools/tests/pipeline_handoffs.integration.test.js`) validating timeout/rate-limit/rollback-style failures propagate into actuation receipts + `receipt_summary` failure taxonomy, alongside existing sensory/autonomy e2e tests in CI

rows.title: Release-gate + canary/rollback enforcement expansion
rows.problem: Existing checks exist but canary/rollback discipline must be mandatory for self-change and high-risk lanes
rows.acceptance: `improvement_controller start-validated` now requires policy-root authorization (lease + approval note) before self-change trial start, and medium-risk executable proposals are blocked when rollback path signals are missing (`medium_risk_missing_rollback_path`)

rows.title: Observability + SLO + runbook completion pass
rows.problem: Metrics/runbooks exist but unattended mode needs complete coverage with actionable alerts
rows.acceptance: Added explicit `verification_pass_rate` health SLO gate in `health_status`, enforced SLO->runbook coverage via `config/autonomy_slo_runbook_map.json` + `slo_runbook_check`, and added `Incident 8: Verification Pass-Rate Regression` procedures in `docs/OPERATOR_RUNBOOK.md` with regression tests

rows.title: Threat-model-driven security test pack
rows.problem: Governance controls need explicit abuse-path validation before long unattended windows
rows.acceptance: `docs/THREAT_MODEL_V1.md` now defines prioritized abuse paths and `memory/tools/tests/security_threat_pack.test.js` enforces deterministic regression tests for prompt-injection ingress, unauthorized mutation, egress bypass, secret isolation/exfiltration, policy-root lease misuse, and integrity tamper paths

rows.title: Contract/version governance closure across adaptive boundaries
rows.problem: Schema/versioning exists, but cross-layer drift checks must be exhaustive to prevent silent corruption
rows.acceptance: `schema_contract_check` now enforces adaptive store `expected_version` pinning per store contract (eyes/focus/habits/reflex/strategy), and CI fails closed on version drift

rows.title: Baseline adaptive-mutation safety kernel
rows.problem: Any topology/self-improvement expansion requires hard guardrails before promotion
rows.acceptance: Enforce mutation budget cap + TTL + quarantine + veto window + rollback receipt for all adaptive topology proposals, and fail closed when safety attestations are missing

rows.title: Baseline objective value-currency propagation
rows.problem: Keep autonomy aligned to objective-specific success definitions during unattended runs
rows.acceptance: Propagate directive-derived value currency into admission + queue ranking baseline paths, with deterministic audit fields and no regression to drift/safety SLOs

rows.title: Read-only recursive introspection baseline
rows.problem: Operator/system visibility into branch pressure and state is required before aggressive restructuring
rows.acceptance: Emit machine-readable branch health snapshot (workers, leases, queues, cooldowns, policy holds) and wire it into health/ops reporting without any auto-restructure actions yet

rows.title: Full repo TypeScript conversion (`.js` -> `.ts`)
rows.problem: Improve long-term maintainability and refactor safety once V1 critical-path typing is stable
rows.acceptance: Core runtime is TS-owned end-to-end (`systems/` + `lib/`), dist-runtime `legacy-pairs --strict=1` is green, and the only non-wrapper JS holdout is `lib/ts_bootstrap.js` by design

rows.title: Explore polyglot service modules behind strict contracts
rows.problem: Enable targeted non-TS modules only where ROI is proven (ecosystem/security/hot path) without creating architecture drift
rows.acceptance: Implemented strict contract pilot via `systems/polyglot/polyglot_service_adapter.ts` + `systems/polyglot/pilot_task_classifier.py`, policy in `config/polyglot_service_policy.json`, contract doc in `docs/POLYGLOT_MODULE_CONTRACT.md`, and coverage in `memory/tools/tests/polyglot_service_adapter.test.js`

rows.title: Dist runtime cutover + legacy paired JS retirement
rows.problem: Remove long-term TS/JS dual-maintenance cost without breaking runtime contracts
rows.acceptance: Dist runtime mode + cutover controller landed (`lib/ts_bootstrap.js`, `systems/ops/dist_runtime_cutover.ts`, `docs/DIST_RUNTIME_CUTOVER.md`), `verify` now enforces `legacy_runtime_js_pairs` via `legacy-pairs`, final non-wrapper twin retired (`systems/fractal/regime_organ.js` wrapper-only), and regression test coverage is green

rows.title: Task-type outcome learning upgrade
rows.problem: Improve model/tool routing quality using empirical task success patterns
rows.acceptance: Routing/ranking consume task-type capability outcomes with tested fallback adjustments in `systems/routing/model_router.ts` + `memory/tools/tests/model_router_routing_features.test.js`

rows.title: Self-experimentation framework with promotion gates
rows.problem: Let system improve methods safely via evidence-based trials
rows.acceptance: Evidence-gated experimentation + promotion workflow is enforced by `systems/autonomy/lever_experiment_gate.ts` and `systems/autonomy/improvement_controller.ts` with rollback-aware receipts/tests

rows.title: Global capability switchboard (security-locked)
rows.problem: Allow rapid feature/capability deactivation under drift or threat without allowing model-driven disablement of security controls
rows.acceptance: Implemented in `systems/security/capability_switchboard.ts` with signed policy-root gate, dual-control toggles, non-deactivatable security lanes, and immutable audit history (`config/capability_switchboard_policy.json`)

rows.title: Exterior anti-sabotage shield + instant auto-reset
rows.problem: Prevent rogue external AI or out-of-channel mutations from silently corrupting system behavior
rows.acceptance: Snapshot/verify/auto-reset + quarantine path implemented in `systems/security/anti_sabotage_shield.ts`, plus realtime `watch` loop with policy defaults/state tracking, strict-fail-on-unrecovered behavior, npm scripts, and regression coverage (`memory/tools/tests/anti_sabotage_shield*.test.js`)

rows.title: Chaos testing program (adaptive + orchestration lanes)
rows.problem: Stress resilience under controlled failures once V1 hardening is stable
rows.acceptance: Scenario-driven chaos receipts + strict recovery checks shipped in `systems/ops/chaos_program.ts` with policy + tests

rows.title: Scale/performance benchmarking harness
rows.problem: Quantify headroom and bottlenecks before broader deployment
rows.acceptance: Reproducible throughput/latency/error/token-efficiency harness is live in `systems/ops/scale_benchmark.ts` with strict thresholds and historical reports

rows.title: External security assessment and pen-test cycle (canonical blocker)
rows.problem: Independent validation reduces blind spots in internal security assumptions
rows.acceptance: Internal intake/closure tracking is ready (`systems/security/external_security_cycle.ts`), but completion is blocked on third-party assessor execution + signed external report delivery

rows.title: Compliance/reporting automation (optional enterprise track)
rows.problem: Enterprise deployment often requires auditable policy/report workflows
rows.acceptance: Governance evidence index + SOC2 readiness report automation is implemented in `systems/ops/compliance_reports.ts` and `config/compliance_controls_map.json`

rows.title: Multi-team/multi-environment release governance
rows.problem: Support organization-scale ownership without destabilizing autonomy
rows.acceptance: Dev/stage/prod promotion governance with owner boundaries + dual-approval protections is enforced by `systems/ops/environment_promotion_gate.ts`

rows.title: Adaptive LLM seed -> specialist training (hardware-aware)
rows.problem: Build long-term AI sovereignty so each deployment can reduce external model dependence with user-specific specialization
rows.acceptance: Curation/planning/eval/promotion workflow with hardware profiles and gating is implemented in `systems/nursery/specialist_training.ts` + `config/nursery_training_policy.json`

rows.title: Dynamic optimization floor by objective criticality
rows.problem: Prevent endless low-impact self-tuning while allowing tighter thresholds for accuracy-critical domains
rows.acceptance: Criticality-aware optimization floor decisions + `good_enough` receipts shipped in `systems/autonomy/objective_optimization_floor.ts`

rows.title: Optimization aperture sensing controller (risk-adaptive)
rows.problem: Automatically adjust how aggressively the system pursues optimization based on sensed risk profile of active work
rows.acceptance: Risk/impact/budget/safety-driven aperture controller now emits lane recommendations + receipts via `systems/autonomy/optimization_aperture_controller.ts`

rows.title: Ternary belief reasoning engine for spine state modeling
rows.problem: Representation efficiency: balanced ternary {-1, 0, +1} maps directly to {pain, unknown, ok} states with cleaner consensus/propagation logic than binary
rows.acceptance: `lib/trit.ts` + `lib/ternary_belief_engine.ts` are integrated into spine state modeling (`systems/spine/spine.ts`) with dedicated tests and daily telemetry

rows.title: SOC2 Type I readiness pack (control mapping + evidence index)
rows.problem: Close the architecture-to-enterprise gap without full compliance overhead too early
rows.acceptance: SOC2 mapping + readiness generation is wired through `systems/ops/compliance_reports.ts` with control map `config/compliance_controls_map.json` and evidence index outputs

rows.title: Disaster recovery game-days + RTO/RPO validation
rows.problem: Prove operational resilience, not just design intent
rows.acceptance: `systems/ops/dr_gameday.ts` now emits cadence-aware DR receipts (`run/list/status`) with retention controls, and `systems/ops/dr_gameday_gate.ts` enforces rolling pass-rate + RTO/RPO regression thresholds for release gating with immutable gate receipts

rows.title: Incident postmortem learning loop (blameless + enforceable actions)
rows.problem: Turn failures into compounding operational maturity
rows.acceptance: `systems/ops/postmortem_loop.ts` now auto-creates incident templates, tracks corrective/preventive actions with owners/dates, and blocks closure until preventive checks are linked, verified passing, and resolved

rows.title: Maintainer handoff pack + bus-factor guardrails
rows.problem: Reduce single-operator risk and improve team legibility at handoff
rows.acceptance: `systems/ops/handoff_pack.ts` now builds deterministic handoff packs (docs + architecture map + ownership matrix) and runs SLA-bounded simulation receipts over critical operator commands

rows.title: Comprehensive documentation system (docs-as-code + coverage gates)
rows.problem: Make system legible and maintainable by external teams without tribal knowledge
rows.acceptance: `systems/ops/docs_coverage_gate.ts` now enforces critical-path docs mapping + broken local link checks, with policy in `config/docs_coverage_map.json`, merge guard integration, and required-checks workflow jobs

rows.title: Autonomous skill generation pipeline (guarded)
rows.problem: Enable Protheus to generate new reusable skills from repeated successful patterns, not just install existing ones
rows.acceptance: Guarded pattern->candidate->sandbox->ROI gate->publish pipeline is implemented in `systems/autonomy/skill_generation_pipeline.ts` with policy + tests and novelty-only blocking

rows.title: Fractal morph planner (directive-conditioned topology)
rows.problem: Enable sports-car style adaptation where structure changes with objective context instead of static loops
rows.acceptance: `systems/fractal/morph_planner.ts` emits bounded `prune/spawn/rewire` proposal-only plans with governance-required flags, writes daily receipts, and is executed by spine (`spine_fractal_morph_plan`)

rows.title: Genome topology ledger + mutation journal
rows.problem: Give the organism a compact, versioned blueprint that can evolve safely over time
rows.acceptance: `systems/fractal/genome_ledger.ts` writes schema-versioned snapshots + hash-linked mutation journal rows with verify command, and spine appends daily genome snapshots (`spine_fractal_genome_snapshot`)

rows.title: Evolution arena (spawn-broker A/B variant trials)
rows.problem: Select adaptations by measured value gain rather than intuition and avoid destabilizing mainline behavior
rows.acceptance: Bounded variant arena with objective scoring + winner/loser receipts is implemented in `systems/fractal/evolution_arena.ts`

rows.title: Full adaptive mutation safety kernel expansion
rows.problem: Expand the V1 baseline guardrails into full topology/genome evolution containment
rows.acceptance: Branch risk scoring + mutation-rate caps + staged promotion bands + high-risk approval controls landed in `systems/autonomy/mutation_safety_kernel.ts` and are enforced by `systems/autonomy/proposal_enricher.ts`

rows.title: Full directive-to-system value currency propagation
rows.problem: Let each objective define its own success currency (revenue, delivery, quality, etc.) while preserving strong money prioritization when applicable
rows.acceptance: Outcome-fitness now feeds currency-policy overlays and calibration receipts (`systems/autonomy/outcome_fitness_loop.ts`, `lib/outcome_fitness.ts`, `lib/strategy_resolver.ts`) so value-currency adaptation closes the loop

rows.title: Full recursive organism introspection map
rows.problem: Close the self-awareness gap by letting the system inspect branch-level function, pressure, and decay internally
rows.acceptance: `systems/fractal/introspection_map.ts` now emits branch health graph + anomaly-driven restructuring candidates with reversible references; spine runs it daily (`spine_fractal_introspection`)

rows.title: System black-box hash ledger (EU compliance fallback)
rows.problem: Anticipate EU compliance/audit pressure with tamper-evident decision traceability while minimizing sensitive payload retention
rows.acceptance: `systems/security/black_box_ledger.ts` now generates append-only chain + per-rollup hashed detail ledgers with verify/status commands (legacy-compatible), and spine rolls up daily (`spine_black_box_ledger`)

rows.title: Dream consolidation gate (bounded sleep cycle)
rows.problem: Compress experience into actionable pattern memory without live-loop instability
rows.acceptance: Implemented in `systems/fractal/organism_cycle.ts` as bounded `dream_consolidation` output (proposal-only, no direct actuation) executed by spine (`spine_fractal_organism_cycle`)

rows.title: Epigenetic regulation tags
rows.problem: Add reversible fast adaptation without direct code mutation
rows.acceptance: `organism_cycle` now updates TTL-bound epigenetic tags in `state/autonomy/fractal/epigenetic_tags.json` using trit-shaped signals and auditable reasons

rows.title: Signed pheromone signaling lane
rows.problem: Reduce spine bottleneck for local coordination while preserving trust boundaries
rows.acceptance: `organism_cycle` now emits signed local pheromone packets with TTL into `state/autonomy/fractal/pheromones/YYYY-MM-DD.json`

rows.title: Resonance/harmony score controller
rows.problem: Detect high-consensus subsystem alignment and exploit it safely
rows.acceptance: `organism_cycle` now computes bounded harmony score and exposes it to summary/cockpit telemetry (`summary.fractal.harmony_score`)

rows.title: Collective archetype pool
rows.problem: Build reusable cross-objective pattern memory with provenance
rows.acceptance: `organism_cycle` now maintains versioned archetype pool (`state/autonomy/fractal/archetype_pool.json`) with confidence/decay metadata and provenance text

rows.title: Observer/Mirror read-only narration layer
rows.problem: Add externalized introspection so operators get deterministic situational summaries instead of raw log spelunking
rows.acceptance: `systems/autonomy/observer_mirror.ts` emits daily mood/statement/recommendation snapshots under `state/autonomy/observer_mirror/` and spine runs it as `spine_observer_mirror`

rows.title: Collective Shadow ranking lane
rows.problem: Convert non-yield + red-team outcomes into bounded avoid/reinforce archetypes that influence ranking without direct actuation
rows.acceptance: `systems/autonomy/collective_shadow.ts` writes `latest.json` archetypes and `autonomy_controller` applies capped penalty/bonus via `candidateCollectiveShadowSignal`

rows.title: Nursery promotion hardening (lineage + cooldown + evidence floor)
rows.problem: Prevent fragile or untraceable specialist checkpoint promotion
rows.acceptance: `systems/nursery/specialist_training.ts` now enforces eval/data minimums, optional drift/regression caps, checkpoint lineage, cooldown windows, and promotion manifests in `state/nursery/training/promotions/`

rows.title: Orchestron emergence hardening pass (candidate risk + trit gates + lineage metadata + richer birth telemetry)
rows.problem: Tighten adaptive workflow safety and observability while preserving generation diversity
rows.acceptance: Candidate-level red-team pressure now influences nursery scoring (`candidate_red_team_pressure`, `red_team_penalty`), auto-apply adds trit floor gates (`min_avg_trit_alignment`, `min_min_trit_alignment`), applied child workflows persist lineage state (`lineage` + `fractal_state`), and birth events now emit `candidate_indexed` + `graft_planned` stages

rows.title: Per-candidate adversarial simulation lane (sandboxed micro red-team)
rows.problem: Replace heuristic candidate risk pressure with direct adversarial evidence before promotion
rows.acceptance: `systems/workflow/orchestron/adversarial_lane.ts` now runs per-candidate probes (critical/non-critical findings + replay artifacts), `nursery_tester` consumes candidate-level adversarial evidence and blocks by per-candidate thresholds, and orchestron payload/birth telemetry now emit adversarial probe receipts (`adversarial_scored`, `candidate_adversarial`)

rows.title: Orchestron creative-primary + trit-depth recursion pass
rows.problem: Push novelty generation and trit-guided adaptation into first-class candidate selection

rows.title: Secret broker backend uplift (keychain/age additive)
rows.problem: Secret handling should be stronger without replacing working broker interfaces abruptly.

rows.title: Root scaffolding rationalization with contract-first moves
rows.problem: `drafts/`, `notes/`, `patches/`, `research/` include mixed utility and runtime-adjacent artifacts; bulk deletion is unsafe.
rows.acceptance: Classify each root scaffold directory into `runtime_required`, `docs_required`, `internal_only`; move only `internal_only` material under `.internal/` (gitignored) or archive; update root/docs/data-scope policies and scripts; `root_surface_contract` + dependent guards pass after move.

rows.title: Public repo presentation pass (non-destructive)

rows.title: Scientific method core primitive
rows.problem: Scientific reasoning is currently distributed across multiple lanes without one typed loop contract.
rows.acceptance: Add a first-class scientific loop engine (`observe -> question -> hypothesize -> predict -> experiment -> analyze -> conclude -> iterate`) with typed step contracts and signed receipts; verify with deterministic unit/integration tests and receipt replay checks; rollback by feature-gating to existing research lane behavior.

rows.title: HypothesisForge background trend + hypothesis engine
rows.problem: Trend/hypothesis generation is not yet continuously operational as a background scientific lane.
rows.acceptance: Promote adversarial challenger + cross-temporal delta capabilities into a continuous hypothesis service that ranks candidates by prior, VOI, and disconfirming experiment value; verify ranking quality and consent gates with regression tests + audit receipts; rollback via service disable flag and queue-lane fallback.

rows.title: Reasoning mirror lane for Phase-1 UI
rows.problem: Operators cannot yet inspect "why this hypothesis" with confidence/evidence/disconfirming test trace in one coherent surface.

rows.title: Scientific mode integration + launch-safe feature flag
rows.problem: Scientific lanes need controlled integration with existing governance/routing without launch breakage.
rows.acceptance: Add `scientific_mode_v4` integration flag (default off) wiring scientific loop, hypothesis forge, and reasoning mirror through typed control plane + receipt logging + research/weaver/redteam gates; verify end-to-end gated behavior with strict integration tests; rollback by forcing flag off and preserving previous execution paths.

rows.title: Autonomous long-horizon experiment scheduler
rows.problem: High-value hypotheses lack a governed, reversible scheduling lane for consent-gated experiment execution.
rows.acceptance: Add background experiment scheduler that prioritizes hypotheses by VOI + risk, enforces sandbox + consent timeout-default-deny, emits full scientific receipt chains, verifies scheduling/rollback behavior with integration tests, and supports explicit rollback to no-op scheduling mode.

rows.title: Meta-science + active learning loop
rows.problem: The scientific stack lacks continuous self-evaluation of reasoning quality and uncertainty-reduction data planning.
rows.acceptance: Add meta-science lane that scores calibration/bias/method effectiveness, runs active-learning data requests for high-impact uncertainty, and proposes new primitive candidates as governed suggestions; verify with deterministic quality metrics/tests and audit receipts; rollback by disabling meta loop while preserving core scientific execution.

rows.title: Advanced statistical extensions for scientific engine
rows.problem: Current analytics bridge needs stronger causal/uncertainty/model-selection breadth for high-confidence scientific conclusions.
rows.acceptance: Extend analytics bridge with advanced causal models, uncertainty quantification, and model selection/ensembles with explicit result provenance in scientific receipts; include governed fallback to Python/Rust paths when needed; verify parity/accuracy contracts with regression tests and rollback to baseline analytics profiles.

rows.title: Enhanced reasoning mirror for Phase-1 UI

rows.acceptance: Upgrade reasoning mirror with real-time calibration metrics, uncertainty charts, explicit "what would change my mind" evidence targets, and one-click suggested experiment routing through consent-gated scheduler; verify UI + receipt linkage tests and rollback by disabling enhanced panel features behind the scientific flag.

rows.title: World-class first-run onboarding wizard

rows.title: Phase-1 traditional UI polish + consistency pass

rows.acceptance: Upgrade README/architecture/docs/help/developer guides so a new contributor can ship first custom lane in under 10 minutes, verify via docs-coverage + onboarding checks, and rollback by preserving previous docs snapshots and link-redirect compatibility.

rows.title: Autogenesis trust + reversibility UX layer

rows.acceptance: Enhance `protheus-top` with richer trend/health/hypothesis charts, proactive recommendations, and exportable receipts/reasoning traces; verify observability contract parity and dashboard regression tests; rollback by falling back to baseline dashboard profile.

rows.title: World-class error handling + guided recovery UX

rows.acceptance: Implement human-friendly failure messaging with deterministic recovery suggestions and one-click troubleshooting flows, verify via failure-path integration tests + receipt reason codes, and rollback by preserving baseline error path behind a feature toggle.

rows.title: Public Collaboration Surface Pack (Issue/PR Templates + Triage Contracts)

rows.acceptance: Add issue template suite (bug/feature/security), triage labels/process docs, response-time expectations, and governance links; verify templates are active and linked from contributing docs.

rows.title: Empty Fort Integrity Guard (No Fabricated Claims)

rows.acceptance: Add explicit claim-evidence policy requiring verifiable artifacts for public metrics, customer/security claims, and benchmark statements; block unsubstantiated claims in docs/release surfaces via checklist and review gate.

rows.acceptance: Define and enforce an org-wide code format/naming standard (TS/JS/Rust/Markdown/shell), add deterministic formatter + lint gates in CI/pre-commit, publish a style guide with examples, standardize PR/issue/release metadata quality, and run a monthly perception audit (readme/docs/repo hygiene/structure consistency) with tracked remediation receipts.

rows.title: Internal Illusion & Integrity Auditor

rows.acceptance: Ship `systems/self_audit/illusion_integrity_auditor.rs` + `systems/self_audit/illusion_integrity_lane.ts` with startup/promotion/manual triggers, backlog drift + UI/scientific completeness checks, signed receipts, suggested fix patches, and strict human-consent gate before any autofix apply.

rows.title: Optional Subtle Reinforcement Layer (`--illusion-mode`)
rows.problem: Presentation polish can still feel "small-team obvious" without quiet, cohesive operator-facing cues that communicate technical maturity under real feature flags.
rows.acceptance: Add an optional gated layer behind `--illusion-mode` / `PROTHEUS_ILLUSION=1` implementing: (1) Reasoning Mirror subtle footer showing factual settled-core state + live binary size when available, (2) CLI reinforcement epilogue for `protheusctl status` and `protheusctl settle` using calm clinical wording that never overclaims in non-settled mode, (3) post-reveal-only narrative easter-egg text path for "The Fort Was Empty" blog surface, and (4) one-flag enable/disable with zero performance impact and no code changes required outside flag plumbing. Enforce professional tone constraints (no meme/boast voice), and verify with snapshot/UX tests plus feature-flag contract tests in both settled and non-settled states.

rows.title: Alien Technology Aesthetic Layer (`alien_aesthetic=1`)
rows.problem: Cross-surface tone and wording are still inconsistent, reducing the intended high-discipline system feel across CLI/UI/receipts.
rows.acceptance: Add a feature-flagged aesthetic/tone pack (`alien_aesthetic=1`) covering CLI (`protheusctl status/settle/audit/migrate`), Reasoning Mirror, `protheus-top`, settle logs, receipts, self-audit reports, and onboarding completion text with calm clinical language and no gimmick style. Reuse `V4-SETTLE-011` substrate fallback behavior and exact line contract, enforce professional-tone guardrails (no hype/humor/exclamation), and verify with snapshot/tone-contract tests plus zero measurable performance regression.

rows.title: Selective Ethereal Language Layer
rows.problem: Applying stylized language across all logs/receipts degrades scanability, dilutes tone, and weakens enterprise operator clarity.
rows.acceptance: Add scoped language policy that applies ethereal phrasing only to high-visibility, low-frequency moments (settle/coalescing, autogenesis emergence, major transition summaries, Reasoning Mirror summaries) while keeping routine logs/errors/receipts/debug output strictly clinical and greppable. Enforce short phrase limits (5-10 words), tense rules (present-progressive in-flight, simple-past completion), preserve exact fallback line from `V4-SETTLE-011`, and verify via snapshot/tone-contract tests plus no performance regression.

rows.title: Core Migration Bridge + Workspace Port Command

rows.acceptance: Implement `systems/migration/bridge.rs` plus `protheusctl migrate --to <org/repo> [--workspace=<name>]` to move remotes, backup state, transfer config/habits/vault/memory/scientific receipts, and emit signed migration receipts with rollback-safe checkpoints.

rows.title: Community Repo Graduation Pack (Banner + Redirect + Pinned Issue)

rows.acceptance: Ship automation/docs for README migration banner, pinned issue text, and repo-description redirect artifacts; verify old→new path is one-click discoverable and references evidence-backed migration guidance.

rows.acceptance: Run post-migration validation for vault, habits, memory, scientific lanes, and routing; emit migration-complete report with transferred assets/perf deltas, consent-gated telemetry, and deterministic pass/fail receipts before marking migration finalized.

rows.title: Core Settling Engine (Compile + Memory-Map + Re-exec)
rows.problem: Runtime hot paths still carry avoidable overhead from mixed execution layers and process indirection after initialization.
rows.acceptance: Implement `systems/settle/settler.rs` and `protheusctl settle` to compile active-core artifacts into a sealed native runtime image, memory-map the image, and re-exec into settled mode with deterministic health checks; verify parity/performance receipts and explicit rollback by reverting to pre-settle runtime profile.

rows.title: Signed Snapshot Vault + Revert/Edit-Core Round Trip
rows.problem: Settling cannot be safely adopted without a deterministic source snapshot and reversible edit workflow under cryptographic custody.
rows.acceptance: Store signed/encrypted source snapshot in vault on first settle, add `protheusctl settle --revert` and `protheusctl edit-core` flow to restore/edit/re-settle with full delta receipts, and verify complete round-trip reversibility with rollback-safe checkpoints.

rows.title: Target Abstraction for Binary + Ternary/Exotic Compile Flags
rows.problem: Settling architecture should not hard-code today's target assumptions if future hardware/runtime targets are introduced.
rows.acceptance: Add compile-target abstraction and feature flags for binary-first settlement plus optional ternary/exotic target simulation adapters, verify target-selection contracts and compatibility receipts, and provide rollback to default binary target on failed target validation.

rows.title: Promotion-Coupled Re-Settlement Policy
rows.problem: Lane promotions currently do not automatically refresh settled artifacts, allowing optimization drift from promoted runtime state.
rows.acceptance: Integrate settlement trigger into promotion/autogenesis pipeline with consent-gated policy, bounded cooldowns, and signed receipts per promotion cycle; verify promotion stability/non-regression and rollback by disabling auto-settle coupling via policy.

rows.title: Settled-State Operator Surface in `protheus-top`
rows.problem: Operators lack a first-class view of settled runtime identity, efficiency gains, and edit/revert readiness state.
rows.acceptance: Add `protheus-top` settled-state panel exposing runtime hash, snapshot lineage, memory/latency deltas, and consent-gated edit-core action status; verify UI/receipt linkage and rollback by feature-gating panel without affecting settle runtime.

rows.title: Modular System-Wide Settling + Rust BlobLoader
rows.problem: Core-only settling leaves major lanes/organs on mixed runtime paths and misses module-level optimization and isolation benefits.
rows.acceptance: Extend settling to module granularity across major organs/lanes with independent settled artifacts and a Rust `BlobLoader` that discovers, memory-maps, and wires module blobs at runtime; require per-module parity/perf receipts and rollback-safe fallback to source/runtime profile when module settle fails.

rows.title: Per-Module Edit + Re-Settle Workflow (`protheusctl edit <module>`)
rows.problem: Settled modules require a deterministic, auditable edit path to avoid high-risk full-system rebuilds for localized changes.
rows.acceptance: Add module edit/re-settle workflow (`protheusctl edit <module>`) that restores signed module snapshot, opens editable workspace, recompiles only target module, and re-settles with full signed delta receipts and reversible checkpoints.

rows.title: Multi-Module Settle Status Dashboard (`protheus-top`)
rows.problem: Operators cannot currently inspect per-module settled health, mapping status, or targeted re-settle readiness from one surface.
rows.acceptance: Enhance `protheus-top` with module-level settled inventory (size, map status, last settle, substrate, health), plus consent-gated actions for `re-settle all` and module-targeted edit/re-settle; verify UI-to-receipt traceability and rollback by feature-gating dashboard layer only.

rows.title: Pluggable Ternary + Future Architecture Module Settle Support
rows.problem: Modular settling needs a uniform target abstraction so upcoming non-binary targets can be adopted without rewriting module orchestration.
rows.acceptance: Extend module settle pipeline with compile-time/runtime target plugins (binary default, ternary simulation, exotic target stubs), per-module target selection policy, and compatibility receipts; ensure fallback to binary target on failed target checks with no data loss.

rows.title: Autogenesis/Promotion-Coupled Differential Module Re-Settlement
rows.problem: System evolution events can drift settled artifacts unless changed modules are automatically re-settled under policy controls.
rows.acceptance: Integrate autogenesis/promotion hooks that compute affected module set and trigger differential module re-settle with cooldown + consent policy, signed receipts, and non-regression gates; fallback by disabling auto-trigger while preserving manual settle controls.

rows.title: Preferred Advanced Substrate Detection + Graceful Binary Fallback
rows.problem: Settling currently lacks a deterministic substrate preference chain and auditable fallback behavior for emerging compute targets.
rows.acceptance: During settle, probe in priority order: balanced ternary substrate (hardware/emulator) then qubit access providers (stub/mock-capable). If neither is available, emit exactly once per settle (unless explicit verbose mode) the line: "No ternary substrate or qubit access detected. Reverting to binary mode." Record probe attempts, selected substrate, and fallback reason as signed receipts, keep probes pluggable/future-proof, and verify zero measurable performance regression on standard binary path.

rows.title: Authoritative Rust Microkernel Cutover Acceleration
rows.problem: Rust slices exist, but default runtime ownership across core hot paths is still mixed and not yet presented as a single launch-grade cutover program.
rows.acceptance: Promote Rust-first ownership for scheduler/IPC/sandbox/memory/crypto hot paths with TS lanes constrained to wrapper/fallback roles; require parity + SLO + rollback receipts for each cutover slice. Publish a tracked-source language composition report (excluding generated/vendor/build artifacts) targeting 55-65% Rust by launch only if gates remain green.

rows.title: Scientific Stack Rust Orchestration + R Bridge Hardening
rows.problem: Scientific orchestration is still primarily TS lane composition, and R integration is present but not fully anchored to Rust-first control flow where performance-sensitive.
rows.acceptance: Move scientific orchestration hot paths (scientific loop + hypothesis scheduling + analysis dispatch) to Rust-backed lanes while preserving optional R backend usage via governed artifact/bridge contracts; add parity/accuracy/rollback receipts proving no scientific regression.

rows.title: Cargo Workspace Professionalization + Rust CI Quality Signal
rows.problem: Rust credibility and maintainability are weakened without one disciplined workspace, explicit MSRV/toolchain policy, and first-class CI evidence.
rows.acceptance: Deliver top-level Cargo workspace/crate boundaries for active Rust lanes, pinned MSRV/toolchain policy, strict lint/test/security gates (`clippy`, `nextest`, dependency/license audits), and generated Rust docs integrated into docs contracts and CI status reporting.

rows.title: Habits/Vault/Adaptive Core Rust Migration Wave (Phased)
rows.problem: High-frequency adaptive loops in habits/vault/core layers remain predominantly TS, limiting end-to-end Rust runtime ownership and hotspot efficiency.
rows.acceptance: Execute phased migration plan for habits/vault/adaptive-core hotspots with parity harness + rollback receipts per phase; preserve TS for UI/plugin/compatibility surfaces only. If reliability/perf gates remain green, track progression toward 75-85% Rust tracked-source share in 4-6 weeks post-launch.

rows.title: Load Model + SLO Contract (1k -> 10k -> 100k -> 1M)
rows.problem: Scale claims are not actionable without one canonical load model, traffic envelope, and SLO/error-budget contract.
rows.acceptance: Define and version a canonical scale model (`DAU`, peak concurrency, RPS, payload mix, write/read ratios) with stage gates (`1k/10k/100k/1M`) and hard SLO/error-budget criteria; publish receipts from reproducible load profiles before each stage promotion.

rows.title: Stateless App-Tier + Horizontal Autoscaling Contract
rows.problem: Control-plane/app-tier coupling still risks vertical bottlenecks and non-deterministic saturation behavior under burst load.
rows.acceptance: Enforce stateless worker contract for scale lanes, add autoscaling policy with saturation safeguards (CPU/memory/queue depth/latency), and prove horizontal scale behavior in staged load tests with rollback-safe scaling policies.

rows.title: Durable Async Pipeline (Queue/Retry/Idempotency/Backpressure)
rows.problem: Million-user traffic requires async durability; missing idempotency/backpressure semantics will cause duplicate work and cascade failures.
rows.acceptance: Add durable queue contracts with idempotency keys, bounded retries, dead-letter handling, and explicit backpressure controls; verify no duplicate side effects and stable queue drain under stress/failure drills.

rows.title: Data Plane Scale Program (Partitioning + Read/Write Split + Online Migration)
rows.problem: Current data paths are not yet governed by one end-to-end partitioning and migration safety contract for high-scale write/read pressure.
rows.acceptance: Implement partitioning/sharding strategy, read/write split policy, and online migration runbooks with deterministic rollback; validate p95/p99 latency and correctness during re-shard/migration simulations before stage promotion.

rows.title: Caching + Edge Delivery Contract (CDN + Hot-Key + Invalidation)
rows.problem: Without disciplined edge/cache contracts, backend saturation and stale-data bugs will block high-concurrency growth.
rows.acceptance: Add canonical cache hierarchy (edge/CDN + service cache + hot-key controls), strict invalidation semantics, and cache-health SLOs; prove backend load reduction and freshness correctness in staged load tests.

rows.title: Multi-Region Resilience + Disaster Recovery Drill Program
rows.problem: Single-region assumptions and untested failover paths are incompatible with million-user availability targets.
rows.acceptance: Implement active/standby or active/active multi-region contract with RTO/RPO objectives, deterministic failover/failback drills, and backup-restore verification receipts tied to release gating.

rows.title: Release Safety at Scale (Canary + Feature Flags + Schema Compatibility)
rows.problem: High-scale deployments amplify blast radius; release controls must be mandatory and schema-safe under live traffic.
rows.acceptance: Enforce progressive delivery policy (canary ramps, automated rollback thresholds, feature-flag kill paths, forward/backward schema compatibility checks), with promotion blocked when safety receipts are missing.

rows.title: Observability + SRE Operations Maturity Pack
rows.problem: Million-user operations require full observability, actionable alerts, and practiced incident response beyond basic telemetry.
rows.acceptance: Complete metrics/tracing/logging coverage for critical flows, define page policies and runbooks with drill SLAs, and verify incident response performance in recurring game-days with auditable outcomes.

rows.title: Abuse/Security Hardening at Scale (Rate-Limit + Tenant Isolation + Auth)
rows.problem: User growth increases attack/abuse surface and noisy-neighbor risk; baseline controls are insufficient without explicit scale hardening contracts.
rows.acceptance: Add tiered rate-limit/abuse controls, tenant-isolation invariants, and auth/session hardening with auditability; validate through adversarial load tests and fail-closed policy checks before each scale-stage promotion.

rows.title: Capacity + Unit Economics Governance (p95/p99 + Cost per User)
rows.problem: Scale can fail economically even when technically stable if cost/perf budgets are not enforced continuously.
rows.acceptance: Define capacity planning model and per-user cost guardrails, enforce latency/cost budgets in release gates, and emit periodic cost-efficiency receipts proving sustainable growth through each scale stage.

rows.title: Config and flag fragmentation
rows.problem: Contradictory policy/flag states create non-deterministic runtime behavior
rows.acceptance: Add precedence + conflict lint and block conflicting gate combinations in CI; linked: `V2-FND-004`, `V3-044`

rows.title: Duplicate execution pathways
rows.problem: Parallel lanes drift and produce inconsistent behavior under load
rows.acceptance: Define one canonical execution path per capability and deprecate alternates with expiry receipts; linked: `V3-039`, `V3-040`

rows.title: Schema drift without migration discipline
rows.problem: Replay/federation break when events/profiles evolve ad hoc
rows.acceptance: Enforce N-2 schema contract + migration plans for any schema change; linked: `V3-049`

rows.title: Determinism gaps in replay
rows.problem: Debugging and cross-hardware parity become unreliable
rows.acceptance: Deterministic mode + replay parity as release blocker on core lanes; linked: `V2-FND-002`, `V2-FND-005`, `V3-044`

rows.title: Operational complexity debt
rows.problem: Organ/lane growth raises MTTR and hides failure modes
rows.acceptance: Enforce complexity budget and net-simplification gate for new organs; linked: `V3-052`, `V2-FND-004`

rows.title: Key and secret lifecycle fragility
rows.problem: Strong runtime guards fail if rotation/recovery paths are weak
rows.acceptance: Rotate/revoke/recover drills with audited ceremonies and failover tests; linked: `V3-051`

rows.title: Supply-chain trust gap
rows.problem: Build/dependency compromise bypasses runtime protections
rows.acceptance: Signed reproducible builds + SBOM + provenance verification in release CI; linked: `V3-048`

rows.title: Multi-node partition and split-brain semantics
rows.problem: Scale-out behavior can diverge and corrupt global state
rows.acceptance: Deterministic quorum + partition simulation tests + failover receipts; linked: `V3-046`, `V2-FND-005`

rows.title: Data retention/churn bloat
rows.problem: Storage and signal quality degrade over time
rows.acceptance: Retention tiers, compaction policy, and "why-kept" tags on long-lived artifacts; linked: `V2-FND-002`, `V3-053`

rows.title: Human override ergonomics under incident stress
rows.problem: Safety controls fail in practice if operators cannot act quickly
rows.acceptance: Timed operator drills with runbook SLA gates and usability fixes; linked: `V2-057`, `V2-FND-005`

rows.title: Catastrophic recovery gap
rows.problem: Total-loss scenarios can break continuity despite local self-healing
rows.acceptance: Implement deterministic resurrection protocol with tested recovery ceremonies; linked: `V3-056`

rows.title: Long-horizon value drift in Heroic Echo
rows.problem: Alignment can narrow subtly over years without explicit renewal and review
rows.acceptance: Add periodic value-anchor renewal with reversible updates and user review gates; linked: `V3-057`

rows.title: Explainability debt at scale
rows.problem: Future operators/successors may not reconstruct why critical actions occurred
rows.acceptance: Require canonical explanation artifacts for major decisions and self-modifications; linked: `V3-058`, `V2-063`

rows.title: External world-model staleness
rows.problem: Tool/profile drift causes silent execution and compliance regressions
rows.acceptance: Add scheduled world-model freshness loop with staleness SLO gates; linked: `V3-060`, `V2-067`, `V3-039`

rows.title: Duality Belief Engine Seed
rows.problem: Establishes duality as foundational advisory reasoning signal across core lanes without hard-gating safety controls.
rows.acceptance: Implemented in `lib/duality_seed.ts` + `config/duality_seed_policy.json` + `config/duality_codex.txt`; integrated into belief/weaver/echo/inversion/assimilation/task decomposition paths with confidence decay + self-validation + shadow receipts; covered by `memory/tools/tests/duality_seed.test.js`.

rows.title: Lightweight Value Attribution Primitive
rows.problem: Core primitive that tracks provenance and influence on every assimilation.
rows.acceptance: Delivered `systems/attribution/value_attribution_primitive.ts` + policy `config/value_attribution_primitive_policy.json`; records provenance/influence, exposes query/status API, emits passport chain links + helix events, and runs shadow-first with regression coverage in `memory/tools/tests/value_attribution_primitive.test.js` plus assimilation/decomposition wiring tests.

rows.title: Storm Value Distribution Layer
rows.problem: High-level layer that handles compensation, payouts, and compliance using the primitive.
rows.acceptance: Delivered `systems/storm/storm_value_distribution.ts` + policy `config/storm_value_distribution_policy.json`; consumes attribution records, enforces constitution gate, generates reversible payout plans (plan/reverse/status) with receipts and creator feedback loop, validated by `memory/tools/tests/storm_value_distribution.test.js`.

rows.title: Creator Opt-In & Public Assimilation Ledger
rows.problem: Turns assimilation into a positive, public, incentivized event.
rows.acceptance: Delivered `systems/storm/creator_optin_ledger.ts` + policy `config/creator_optin_ledger_policy.json`; supports opt-in/out, contribution tracking, privacy-preserving public ledger projection, badges/tiering, passport-linked receipts, and regression coverage in `memory/tools/tests/creator_optin_ledger.test.js`.

rows.title: Task Decomposition Primitive + Parallel Micro-Task Execution
rows.problem: Turns large goals into executable micro-work, enabling fast autonomous and crowd-assisted progress at scale.
rows.acceptance: Implemented in `systems/execution/task_decomposition_primitive.ts` + policy `config/task_decomposition_primitive_policy.json`; emits standardized micro-task profiles with Weaver/Storm parallel routing, Heroic Echo + constitution gates, duality indicators, and per-task attribution/passport linkage; validated by `memory/tools/tests/task_decomposition_primitive.test.js`.

rows.title: Memory Evolution Primitive (MemRL-inspired)
rows.problem: Runtime RL directly on episodic memory for true self-evolution without retraining or human labels.
rows.acceptance: Delivered `systems/assimilation/memory_evolution_primitive.ts` + policy `config/memory_evolution_primitive_policy.json`; two-phase retrieval (episodes + causal graph), Q-value updates, Doctor feedback queueing, and shadow-first receipts validated in `memory/tools/tests/memory_evolution_primitive.test.js` + assimilation integration tests.

rows.title: Context Navigation Primitive (RLM-inspired)
rows.problem: Code-based recursive navigation of massive external data/context without stuffing token windows.
rows.acceptance: Delivered `systems/assimilation/context_navigation_primitive.ts` + policy `config/context_navigation_primitive_policy.json`; recursive context decomposition/filtering with executable profile output for universal execution lanes and token-bloat reduction metrics, validated in `memory/tools/tests/context_navigation_primitive.test.js` + assimilation integration tests.

rows.title: Generative Simulation Mode
rows.problem: Synthetic digital-twin environments for stress-testing plans before real execution.
rows.acceptance: Delivered `systems/assimilation/generative_simulation_mode.ts` + policy `config/generative_simulation_mode_policy.json`; staged synthetic scenario simulation (beta stage lock, drift/safety/yield verdicts, Heroic Echo/constitution blockers), integrated into assimilation gating and validated by `memory/tools/tests/generative_simulation_mode.test.js` + assimilation integration tests.

rows.title: Collective Reasoning Primitive
rows.problem: Explicit trust/accountability protocol for multi-agent coordination under uncertainty.
rows.acceptance: Delivered `systems/assimilation/collective_reasoning_primitive.ts` + policy `config/collective_reasoning_primitive_policy.json`; quorum/trust-weighted consensus + delegation profiles + trust ledger updates, emitted weaver collective profile stream (`state/autonomy/weaver/collective_reasoning_profiles.jsonl`), and validated by `memory/tools/tests/collective_reasoning_primitive.test.js` + assimilation integration tests.

rows.title: Environment-Centric Evolution Layer
rows.problem: Agents evolve primarily through environment feedback rather than internal loops alone.
rows.acceptance: Delivered `systems/assimilation/environment_evolution_layer.ts` + policy `config/environment_evolution_layer_policy.json`; EMA-based robustness scoring, confidence shaping, Doctor queue hooks, and assimilation wiring for post-outcome feedback with validation in `memory/tools/tests/environment_evolution_layer.test.js` + assimilation integration tests.

rows.title: Test-Time Memory Evolution Primitive
rows.problem: Agents actively refine memory after every interaction via search/synthesize/evolve loops.
rows.acceptance: Delivered `systems/assimilation/test_time_memory_evolution_primitive.ts` + policy `config/test_time_memory_evolution_primitive_policy.json`; search/synthesize/evolve scoring over episodic memory with step-reduction estimation, shadow receipts, and assimilation integration (`test_time_memory_evolution` lane in `systems/assimilation/assimilation_controller.ts`) validated by `memory/tools/tests/test_time_memory_evolution_primitive.test.js` + assimilation integration tests.

rows.title: Group-Evolving Agents Primitive
rows.problem: Shared innovation reuse across cooperating agents outperforms solo evolution paths.
rows.acceptance: Delivered `systems/assimilation/group_evolving_agents_primitive.ts` + policy `config/group_evolving_agents_primitive_policy.json`; peer trust + innovation reuse ledger for multi-agent experience sharing, shadow-first receipts, and assimilation integration (`group_evolving_agents` lane) validated by `memory/tools/tests/group_evolving_agents_primitive.test.js` + assimilation integration tests.

rows.title: Generative Meta-Model Primitive
rows.problem: Model-steering signal that preserves fluency/stability while allowing capability adaptation.
rows.acceptance: Delivered `systems/assimilation/generative_meta_model_primitive.ts` + policy `config/generative_meta_model_primitive_policy.json`; activation-manifold proxy (EMA centroid + bounded steering), fluency/stability safeguards, and shadow receipts wired into assimilation simulation inputs, validated by `memory/tools/tests/generative_meta_model_primitive.test.js` + assimilation integration tests.

rows.title: Self-Teacher Distillation Primitive
rows.problem: Label-free continual improvement by distilling from internal high-quality trajectories.
rows.acceptance: Delivered `systems/assimilation/self_teacher_distillation_primitive.ts` + policy `config/self_teacher_distillation_primitive_policy.json`; on-policy golden-trajectory filtering with teacher/student gain estimation, auditable receipts, and assimilation integration (`self_teacher_distillation` lane) validated by `memory/tools/tests/self_teacher_distillation_primitive.test.js` + assimilation integration tests.

rows.title: Adaptive Ensemble Routing Primitive
rows.problem: Context-aware switching between aligned and complementary specialist lanes improves outcomes.
rows.acceptance: Delivered `systems/assimilation/adaptive_ensemble_routing_primitive.ts` + policy `config/adaptive_ensemble_routing_primitive_policy.json`; context-aware aligned/complementary specialist routing with weaver stream emission (`state/autonomy/weaver/adaptive_ensemble_profiles.jsonl`) and assimilation integration (`adaptive_ensemble_routing` lane), validated by `memory/tools/tests/adaptive_ensemble_routing_primitive.test.js` + assimilation integration tests.

rows.title: Background Persistent Agent Runtime
rows.problem: Adds always-on, trigger-driven autonomous runtime scheduling as a reusable primitive instead of bespoke loop code.
rows.acceptance: Delivered `systems/autonomy/background_persistent_agent_runtime.ts` + policy `config/background_persistent_agent_runtime_policy.json`; queue/trigger/tick primitive with bounded activations, shadow-first apply control, and integration wiring in `systems/continuum/continuum_core.ts` + `systems/primitives/runtime_scheduler.ts`, validated by `memory/tools/tests/background_persistent_agent_runtime.test.js`, `memory/tools/tests/runtime_scheduler.test.js`, and `memory/tools/tests/continuum_core.test.js`.

rows.title: Federated Group-Evolution Archive Bridge
rows.problem: Extends group-evolution with governed cross-instance export/import so innovation sharing is portable and trust-scored.
rows.acceptance: Extended `systems/assimilation/group_evolving_agents_primitive.ts` + policy `config/group_evolving_agents_primitive_policy.json` with `export-archive` / `import-archive` commands, attestation thresholding, trust-weighted merge, and federation receipts; validated by `memory/tools/tests/group_evolving_agents_primitive.test.js` + `memory/tools/tests/assimilation_controller.test.js`.

rows.title: Computer-Use Hardening Profiles
rows.problem: Adds reusable session/checkpoint/assert/recovery/handoff hardening profiles for browser/API computer-use lanes.
rows.acceptance: Extended `systems/actuation/universal_execution_primitive.ts` + `systems/actuation/real_world_claws_bundle.ts` and policies (`config/universal_execution_primitive_policy.json`, `config/real_world_claws_policy.json`) with hardening checkpoints, verification handoff routing, and bounded recovery attempts; validated by `memory/tools/tests/universal_execution_primitive.test.js` + `memory/tools/tests/real_world_claws_bundle.test.js`.

rows.title: Agentic Transaction Negotiation Profiles
rows.problem: Adds profile-driven contract/payment negotiation without hardcoding platform-specific business logic.
rows.acceptance: Extended `systems/workflow/payment_skills_bridge.ts` + `systems/finance/economic_entity_manager.ts` and policy `config/payment_skills_bridge_policy.json` with governed negotiation profiles, round-based decisions, audit state, and finance-lane integration (`contract-negotiate`), validated by `memory/tools/tests/payment_skills_bridge.test.js` + `memory/tools/tests/economic_entity_manager.test.js`.

rows.title: Axolotl Seed-Training Bridge + Native Distillation
rows.problem: Use Axolotl for immediate seed-model fine-tuning while assimilating toward an innate in-repo trainer with explicit external credit.
rows.acceptance: Delivered in `systems/nursery/specialist_training.ts` + `config/nursery_training_policy.json`: hardware-aware backend routing now supports `axolotl` with reproducible config generation/output contracts, and Axolotl runs emit value-attribution records tagged to `axolotl`; regression coverage added in `memory/tools/tests/specialist_training.test.js`.

rows.title: Nursery Real Trainer Backend Wiring (Non-Scaffold)
rows.problem: Current nursery `train` flow writes dataset/checkpoint scaffolds and quarantine manifests but does not execute a real finetune backend.
rows.acceptance: `systems/nursery/specialist_training.ts train` now executes concrete trainer backends (`native` and `axolotl`) and persists real checkpoint artifacts + measured training metrics; queue/quarantine scoring is backend-derived (no synthetic fixed metrics), with fail-closed backend error handling covered by `memory/tools/tests/specialist_training.test.js`.

rows.title: Assimilation Intake Metadata Enrichment Bridge
rows.problem: Assimilation candidacy from workflow execution currently records sparse usage-only signals, leaving legal/research/profile gates underinformed for real external adapters/tools.
rows.acceptance: Extend `systems/workflow/workflow_executor.ts` assimilation usage signal extraction and ledger writes to include normalized legal/surface metadata (license, source URL/domain, tos/robots/data-rights checks, docs/API/auth/rate-limit hints), and verify the enriched fields flow into `systems/assimilation/legal_gate.ts` + `systems/assimilation/research_probe.ts` with deterministic integration coverage.

rows.title: Candidacy Threshold Calibration for Low-Spread High-Volume Lanes
rows.problem: Current `min_workflow_spread`/`min_days_observed` thresholds can stall high-volume adapter candidates indefinitely even when usage/pain evidence is strong, reducing practical assimilation throughput.
rows.acceptance: Add policy-governed threshold calibration path in `systems/assimilation/candidacy_ledger.ts` + `config/assimilation_policy.json` (bounded overrides by source/risk/evidence quality), emit explicit blocker telemetry in assess/status output, and cover calibration/non-abuse behavior in assimilation controller + ledger tests.

rows.title: Candidate Ranking Metric Contract Fix (`pain_cost_score`)
rows.problem: Assimilation controller currently reads `thresholds.metrics.pain_cost_score` even though candidacy ledger does not emit that metric, causing baseline rank/impact/weight distortion.
rows.acceptance: Unify candidacy metric schema between `systems/assimilation/candidacy_ledger.ts` and `systems/assimilation/assimilation_controller.ts` (either emit `pain_cost_score` or switch all reads to existing metrics), and add regression assertions that ranking/impact/attribution weights are non-zero and deterministic for ready candidates.

rows.title: Per-Run Assimilation Snapshot Retention (No Same-Day Overwrite)
rows.problem: `runs/YYYY-MM-DD.json` currently overwrites prior same-day runs, reducing auditability and regression replay fidelity for high-frequency calibration cycles.
rows.acceptance: Persist run artifacts by run id (`runs/YYYY-MM-DD/<run_id>.json` or equivalent append-only manifest), keep latest pointer semantics, and extend `status`/history queries plus tests to prove multiple same-day runs remain independently retrievable.

rows.title: Hidden Evaluation Execution Lane + Outcome Wiring
rows.problem: Hidden evaluation currently emits only suite metadata (`suite_hash`, `case_count`) without executable scoring or gating impact, weakening anti-gaming assurance.
rows.acceptance: Implement deterministic hidden-eval execution + receipts (seeded case generation, pass/fail scores, reason codes), wire outcomes into `setAttemptOutcome`/cooldown/promotion logic, and add tests for pass/fail branches affecting candidate outcomes under shadow/live modes.

rows.title: Assimilation Policy Enforcement Closure (Wire or Retire Dead Knobs)
rows.problem: Several parsed policy fields are not materially enforced in run decisions, creating governance ambiguity and false confidence in controls.
rows.acceptance: Audit every key in `config/assimilation_policy.json`; for each field, either enforce behavior in controller/ledger flow with tests or remove/deprecate it with migration notes. Required closure includes `approval_threshold_score`, `max_assimilation_depth`, permanent-promotion/TTL controls, atrophy controls, and integration toggles like `research_organ_enabled`/`doctor_required`.

rows.title: Weaver Gate Strict Mode (Missing Snapshot Fail-Closed by Risk)
rows.problem: Weaver snapshot absence currently defaults to allow, which is fail-open and can undercut constitutional guard expectations for medium/high-risk candidates.
rows.acceptance: Add policy-controlled strict weaver gate behavior in `systems/assimilation/assimilation_controller.ts` to block medium/high-risk processing when snapshot is missing/stale, keep configurable low-risk fallback behavior, and add explicit reason-code coverage in assimilation controller tests.

rows.title: Harness Apply Path for Self-Improving Red-Team
rows.problem: `red_team_harness` currently hardcodes `apply: false` when calling self-improvement, preventing governed live promotion through the main harness path.
rows.acceptance: `systems/autonomy/red_team_harness.ts` now propagates CLI/policy apply intent (`--self-improve-apply`) into `systems/redteam/self_improving_redteam_trainer.ts`; downstream policy gates (`shadow_only` + `allow_apply`) remain authoritative. Coverage added in `memory/tools/tests/red_team_harness.test.js` for shadow-blocked vs apply-eligible runs.

rows.title: Task Decomposition Live Execution Handoff
rows.problem: Task decomposition currently labels non-shadow outcomes but only emits profiles/queues; it does not execute decomposed micro-tasks.
rows.acceptance: `systems/execution/task_decomposition_primitive.ts` now adds an apply-time handoff lane that dispatches eligible micro-task profiles to governed executors with per-task dispatch status + receipts (`task_micro_execution_dispatch`) while keeping queue-only behavior in shadow mode; policy/config wiring added and validated in `memory/tools/tests/task_decomposition_primitive.test.js`.

rows.title: Storm Distribution Settlement Executor Lane
rows.problem: Storm value distribution currently produces plans/reversals/receipts but has no governed settlement execution lane for payouts.
rows.acceptance: `systems/storm/storm_value_distribution.ts` now includes `settle` command/path executing payout settlements through payment/blockchain adapters with reversible tokens, per-payout outcomes, and partial-failure handling; deterministic `plan/reverse/status` remain intact. Coverage added in `memory/tools/tests/storm_value_distribution.test.js`.

rows.title: Daemon Soak Promotion Gate + Receipts (24-48h)
rows.problem: Stage 3 daemon path is live, but fallback retirement should be evidence-gated by sustained stability under real load.
rows.acceptance: Added `soak-gate` lane to `systems/memory/rust_memory_transition_lane.ts` + policy wiring in `config/rust_memory_transition_policy.json` to evaluate 24-48h windows for p99 latency, pass rate, fallback-trigger count, and daemon restart count, with fail-closed strict mode and receipt persistence (`state/memory/rust_transition/soak_promotion_decisions.jsonl`); coverage added in `memory/tools/tests/rust_memory_transition_lane.test.js`.

rows.title: Daemon Supervision + Stale PID/Socket Reaper
rows.problem: Long-lived daemon operation can degrade after crashes/reboots if stale pid/socket state is not cleaned deterministically.
rows.acceptance: Added daemon lifecycle supervisor `systems/memory/rust_memory_daemon_supervisor.{ts,js}` + policy `config/rust_memory_daemon_supervisor_policy.json` (`start/stop/restart/status/healthcheck/reap-stale`) with restart backoff, stale pid/socket reaping, and lifecycle receipts; wired stale PID preflight into `systems/memory/memory_recall.ts` autostart path; added crash-recovery regression coverage in `memory/tools/tests/rust_memory_daemon_supervisor.test.js` and refreshed transition contracts/tests.

rows.title: Fallback Retirement Gate (JS Emergency-Only)
rows.problem: Broad JS fallback keeps complexity and latency overhead high and can hide memory-kernel regressions.
rows.acceptance: Added `memory_fallback_retirement_gate` (`systems/memory/memory_fallback_retirement_gate.ts`) with strict policy + emergency one-click toggle, incident receipts on fallback attempts, and `memory_recall` enforcement that blocks JS fallback when retired; regression coverage added for strict-block and emergency-allow flows.

rows.title: Direct Memory Encryption Plane Integration (Replace DB Shim)
rows.problem: Memory-at-rest encryption should use the canonical envelope lane for consistent key-rotation/audit behavior across organs.
rows.acceptance: Rust memory hot-state now persists canonical organ-state envelope JSON (`schema_id: organ_state_envelope`, lane `hot_state`) instead of raw cipher strings, auto-migrates legacy/plain rows on open, rejects non-envelope reads post-migration, and exposes `verify-envelope` runtime verification for receipt generation.

rows.title: In-Process Rust Memory Binding Lane (`napi-rs`)
rows.problem: Daemon/CLI transport is robust but still adds avoidable overhead on hottest memory call sites.
rows.acceptance: Added optional in-process `napi` adapter lane (`systems/memory/rust_napi_binding.ts`) and integrated it into unified transport orchestration (`memory_transport` + `memory_recall`) so query/get attempt N-API first when available, with deterministic daemon/CLI fallback and parity regression tests (including fake-module N-API fixtures).

rows.title: Contract-Coupled Defense Dependency Mesh
